text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are roaring with excitement before the
start of the Classic G1 Oka Sho. Many in the
audience are cheering for Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in the waiting room, Mejiro Dober shrinks
back under the cheers from the crowd. However,
recalling her experience at the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies gives her confidence, and she makes her
way to the gates.
